description_long: This is a pair of sunglasses with a bold, rectangular full-rim frame and dark, opaque lenses. The frame appears to be made of a sturdy plastic material, with a matte finish and a slightly thick profile, giving it a modern and robust look. The temples are straight and wide, tapering slightly towards the ends, and feature subtle metallic accents near the hinges. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, providing a seamless connection between the lenses. The lenses are deep black, offering complete coverage and privacy, with no visible gradient or transparency. There are no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments, resulting in a clean and minimalist aesthetic.
description: A pair of rectangular, full-rim sunglasses with thick matte frames and deep black lenses, featuring wide, straight temples and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and dark, opaque lenses.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, wide temple and the thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the temples and the continuous bridge structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the temple's length and subtle metallic accent near the hinge.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a thick, bold profile and straight, wide temples. The design is modern and robust, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements.
attribute_lens_tint: Deep black, fully opaque lenses with no visible gradient, transparency, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a straight, seamless connection between the lenses; no separate nose pads or distinctive shaping.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, wide, and slightly tapered at the ends, with subtle metallic accents near the hinges and no additional patterns or engravings.
